title: Near-total duplicate content between NZ and AU sites
description: 53/61 NZ pages have identical titles, 41 identical meta descriptions, 50 identical H1s as their AU equivalents. This creates severe canonical confusion for Google.
fix: Differentiate all titles, H1s, and meta descriptions per country. Add 'NZ'/'AU' or location-specific keywords.

title: 24 pages missing meta descriptions (12 per site)
description: Pages like /pages/who-is-tinka, /pages/faq, /pages/giant-bubble-reviews, /pages/giant-bubble-giveaway-2023, /blogs/blog, and 7 collection pages lack meta descriptions entirely.
fix: Add unique 120-158 char meta descriptions to all listed pages

title: 2 pages with massively overstuffed meta descriptions (1,859 chars)
description: /products/240ml-concentrate-giant-bubble-kit has a 1,859-character meta description on both sites. This is a full product description being injected into the meta field.
fix: Trim to 120-158 chars. Check Shopify theme/SEO app settings

title: 6 pages missing H1 tags (3 per site)
description: /pages/faq, /pages/giant-bubble-giveaway-2023, and /collections/best-sellers have no H1 tag on both sites.
fix: Add one H1 per page with primary keyword

title: 55 titles exceed the 60-char display limit
description: Titles range from 62-128 chars. Common pattern: long page title + '– Giant Bubbles by Tinka' suffix pushes them over. Blog posts are the worst (81-105 chars).
fix: Rewrite titles to 50-60 chars. Shorten Shopify suffix from '– Giant Bubbles by Tinka' to '– Tinka'

title: 65 meta descriptions exceed 160-char limit
description: Nearly every product page and many blog posts have 319-324 char meta descriptions that get truncated in SERPs.
fix: Rewrite all to 120-158 chars with concise summary and CTA

title: 2 pages with multiple H1 tags (1 per site)
description: /pages/amazing-giant-bubble-recipe has 2 H1s: 'Amazing Giant Bubble Recipe' and 'Tinka 500ml Giant Bubble Concentrate (Makes 7L)' (Shopify featured product section)
fix: Keep only one H1, demote the second to H2

title: 1,002/1,855 images missing alt text (54%)
description: NZ: 548/1,045 (52%) missing alt. AU: 454/810 (56%) missing alt. Design/decorative images from the Shopify theme lack alt attributes.
fix: Add descriptive alt text to all product images. Use alt='' (empty) for decorative theme images.

title: 15 meta descriptions under 120 chars
description: Collections like /collections/no-frills (32 chars), /collections/refills (42 chars), /pages/contact (56 chars) have too-short descriptions.

title: Blog posts lack contextual product links
description: Blog posts have minimal internal linking back to relevant product pages. This misses internal link equity passing.
fix: Add contextual product recommendations within blog post body content

title: Server response times are good (0.28-0.82s)
description: All tested pages return <1s. No broken links found. Recommend running Google PageSpeed Insights with API key for full Core Web Vitals.
fix: Configure PageSpeed API key and run full audit
